message.content:
Apply NinjaPromo design system to these generative tool pages. READ each file first, then EDIT them.

NinjaPromo design CSS classes (in index.html):
- `.ninja-card` — bg-#111111, border rgba(255,255,255,0.08), rounded-1rem
- `.gradient-text` — gradient text indigo→purple→pink
- `.btn-gradient` — pill gradient button, rounded-full
- `.gradient-border` — gradient border card

Design patterns:
- Cards: `ninja-card` (replaces bg-[#0c0815])
- Buttons: rounded-full, primary=`btn-gradient`, secondary=`border border-white/[0.08] bg-white/[0.04] rounded-full`
- Typography: bold sans headings, `gradient-text` accents
- Borders: border-white/[0.06] or border-white/[0.08]
- Text: white headings, gray-500 body, purple-400 accents
- Inputs/textareas: bg-[#111111] border border-white/[0.08] rounded-xl
- Tabs: rounded-full pill selectors

Files to update (READ then EDIT each one):

1. `C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test\pages\GenerativeTools.tsx` — Tool grid cards: ninja-card, section titles with gradient-text, search input updated styling
2. `C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test\pages\SMCStudio.tsx` — Form cards: ninja-card, buttons: btn-gradient rounded-full, textareas: bg-[#111111]
3. `C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test\pages\SchemaOrg.tsx` — Code output: ninja-card, buttons: rounded-full
4. `C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test\pages\RobotsTxt.tsx` — Similar treatment
5. `C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test\pages\SourceOfTruth.tsx` — Form and output: ninja-card, buttons: rounded-full

Preserve ALL functionality. Only change styling classes, not logic or state management.
